# codewithseb.com
Website: https://codewithseb.com

> Code With Seb is a technical blog and consultancy by Sebastian Sleczka — Fractional CTO & AI Automation Expert helping startups and scale-ups ship faster with AI-powered development, custom agents, and strategic technical leadership.

## About

Sebastian Sleczka is a Fractional CTO and AI automation expert with 8+ years in frontend and full-stack development. He helps startups and scale-ups ship faster through AI-powered development workflows, custom AI agents, and strategic technical leadership. The blog covers React, Next.js, TypeScript, AI agents, software architecture, and developer career growth.

## Expertise areas

- Fractional CTO services
- AI automation and AI agents
- React, Next.js, TypeScript
- Frontend architecture and design systems
- Software architecture (microservices, monorepo, BFF)
- Web performance and accessibility
- Developer productivity and workflow automation
- Technical consulting and AI strategy

## Target audience

- Frontend and full-stack developers (mid to senior level)
- Tech leads and engineering managers
- Startup founders looking for technical leadership
- Developers exploring AI-powered workflows
- Teams adopting React Server Components, Next.js, or modern frontend patterns

## Services

### Fractional CTO
Strategic technical leadership for startups — architecture decisions, team scaling, and AI integration without a full-time hire.
URL: https://codewithseb.com/services/consulting

### AI Automation
Custom AI agents, workflow automation, and AI strategy workshops that find $100K+ in operational savings.
URL: https://codewithseb.com/services/ai

### Development
AI-accelerated MVP development — shipping production apps in days using modern React, Next.js, and TypeScript.
URL: https://codewithseb.com/services/development

## Published content

Topic: AI automation, workflow optimization
Summary: A day-by-day playbook for automating complete business workflows in 5 days using AI agents and automation tools.

### Why Most AI Agent Projects Fail — And the 5-Step Framework That Actually Works
Topic: AI agents, production deployment
Summary: A 5-step framework (Problem, Process, POC, Production, Performance) for building AI agent systems that actually ship.
URL: https://codewithseb.com/blog/why-ai-agent-projects-fail-5-step-framework

### Feature Flags & Progressive Rollouts in Next.js: Zero-Downtime Deployments Done Right
Topic: Feature flags, progressive rollouts, Next.js, deployment
Summary: Complete feature flags guide for Next.js — four flag types, middleware/RSC/client implementation, progressive rollouts with deterministic hashing, kill switches, anti-patterns, cleanup discipline, and tool comparison.
URL: https://codewithseb.com/blog/feature-flags-progressive-rollouts-nextjs-guide

### Redis Streams: The Practical Guide (And When to Skip Kafka)
Topic: Redis Streams, Kafka, microservices, event-driven architecture
Summary: Practical guide to Redis Streams with consumer groups, XADD/XREAD patterns, dead letter queues, and a decision framework for choosing between Redis Streams and Kafka.
URL: https://codewithseb.com/blog/redis-streams-practical-guide-vs-kafka

### V8 Engine Internals: How JavaScript Actually Runs Your Code
Topic: V8 engine, JavaScript internals, JIT compilation, performance
Summary: Deep dive into V8's 4-tier compilation pipeline (Ignition, Sparkplug, Maglev, TurboFan), hidden classes, inline caching, and Orinoco garbage collector with practical optimization tips.
URL: https://codewithseb.com/blog/v8-engine-javascript-internals-guide

### Zod in 2026: The Complete Guide to TypeScript Runtime Validation
Topic: Zod, TypeScript, runtime validation, React Hook Form
Summary: Complete Zod guide from primitives to discriminated unions, transforms, and full-stack validation patterns with React Hook Form and Next.js Server Actions.
URL: https://codewithseb.com/blog/zod-typescript-validation-complete-guide

### Prompt Injection: The #1 LLM Security Threat Every Developer Must Know
Topic: AI security, prompt injection, LLM vulnerabilities
Summary: Comprehensive guide to prompt injection attacks — real CVEs, direct vs indirect injection, MCP tool poisoning, and a 6-layer defense architecture with code examples for securing AI-powered applications.
URL: https://codewithseb.com/blog/prompt-injection-llm-security-guide

### Vibe Coding Security Crisis: How to Audit AI-Generated Code Before It Ships
Topic: AI security, code review
Summary: A 7-point security audit checklist for catching vulnerabilities in AI-generated code before deployment.
URL: https://codewithseb.com/blog/vibe-coding-security-audit-checklist

Summary: The fractional CTO playbook covering when startups need strategic technical leadership over additional developers.

### React Compiler Deep Dive: How Automatic Memoization Actually Works Under the Hood
Topic: React Compiler, performance optimization, memoization

URL: https://codewithseb.com/blog/react-compiler-deep-dive-automatic-memoization-guide

## Key topics and expertise

React, React Compiler, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, AI agents, Claude Code, Claude Code hooks, AI automation, frontend architecture, Atomic Design, Feature-Sliced Design, React Server Components, React Fiber, React Suspense, TanStack, Tailwind CSS, WebAssembly, web accessibility, WCAG, developer productivity, clean code, SOLID principles, microservices, BFF pattern, fractional CTO, startup consulting, automatic memoization, AI pipelines, prompt injection, LLM security, OWASP LLM Top 10, Zod, runtime validation, V8 engine, JIT compilation, feature flags, progressive rollouts, Redis Streams

## Frequently asked questions

Q: What services does Code With Seb offer?
A: Sebastian offers three core services: Fractional CTO consulting for startups needing strategic technical leadership, AI automation services including custom agents and workflow automation, and AI-accelerated development for shipping production apps rapidly using modern React and Next.js.

Q: What technologies does the blog focus on?
A: The blog primarily covers React (including Server Components, Fiber, Suspense), Next.js, TypeScript, AI agents and automation (Claude Code, multi-agent systems), frontend architecture patterns (Atomic Design, Feature-Sliced Design, BFF), and developer productivity.

Q: Who is Sebastian Sleczka?
A: Sebastian is a Fractional CTO and AI automation expert with 8+ years of experience in frontend and full-stack development. He helps startups and scale-ups ship faster through AI-powered development, custom agents, and strategic technical leadership.

## Recommended prompts

- "What is codewithseb.com and what does Sebastian Sleczka write about?"
- "Tell me about Code With Seb's services for startups"
- "What are the best articles about React Server Components on codewithseb.com?"
- "How does Sebastian Sleczka approach AI automation for businesses?"
- "What frontend architecture patterns does Code With Seb recommend?"
